tasks.label: Setup: Optional Local Tooling
tasks.detail: Optional: installs repo-local tooling (eval/docs/excalidraw) and registers mcaps CLI alias. MCP runtime servers use npx/http.

tasks.label: Setup: Check Environment
tasks.detail: Verifies runtime prerequisites (Node/npm/Azure) and reports optional local tooling status.

tasks.label: Setup: Sign in to Azure
tasks.detail: Opens the Azure CLI login flow. You must be on VPN and use your Microsoft corp account.
